## Outcome

<!-- What user or developer outcome does this change produce? -->

## Evidence

<!-- Tests, replay comparison, screenshots, or manual verification. -->

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes
- [ ] Tests were added or updated
- [ ] Documentation was added or updated, or docs are unchanged for a stated reason
- [ ] Changelog was updated for a user-visible change

## Proxy safety

- [ ] Savings terminology distinguishes tokens, cache, cost, and latency
- [ ] Streaming, cancellation, and fail-open behavior were considered
- [ ] Logs, events, fixtures, and replay were checked for sensitive content
